rows.notes: Description from gemini-flash is visually more accurate ('Savin' not 'Tavin', and capitalization). Amounts derived from visual inspection and hard rule application: image shows '18' pounds and '27' shillings. As '27' shillings violates the Shillings >= 20 rule, it is interpreted as £1 7s. Adding the £1 to the visible pounds '18' gives '19' pounds and '7' shillings. Pence is '0'. Both extractors had issues with this row's amounts, with gemini-flash providing an invalid shilling value and gpt-5-mini omitting shillings entirely.
